openmeter/taxcode/adapter.purpose: Ent/PostgreSQL adapter implementing taxcode.Repository. Owns all DB reads and writes for TaxCode entities including a raw JSONB containment query for app-mapping lookups.

patterns.name: TransactingRepo on every write
patterns.description: Every mutating method (Create, Update, Delete) wraps its body in entutils.TransactingRepo or TransactingRepoWithNoValue so the ctx-bound Ent transaction is honored.
patterns.example: return entutils.TransactingRepo(ctx, a, func(ctx context.Context, a *adapter) (taxcode.TaxCode, error) { ... })

patterns.name: Soft-delete via SetDeletedAt
patterns.description: DeleteTaxCode sets deleted_at to clock.Now() rather than issuing a hard DELETE; read queries filter with Where(taxcodedb.DeletedAtIsNil()).

patterns.name: WithTx/Self/Tx triad for transaction rebinding
patterns.description: adapter implements Tx(ctx), WithTx(ctx, tx *TxDriver) *adapter, and Self() *adapter to satisfy entutils.TransactingRepo's TxCreator contract.
patterns.example: func (a *adapter) WithTx(ctx context.Context, tx *entutils.TxDriver) *adapter { txClient := entdb.NewTxClientFromRawConfig(ctx, *tx.GetConfig()); return &adapter{db: txClient.Client(), logger: a.logger} }

patterns.name: Input.Validate() called before any DB access
patterns.description: Every exported method calls input.Validate() as its first statement and returns early on error.
patterns.example: if err := input.Validate(); err != nil { return taxcode.TaxCode{}, err }

patterns.name: JSONB containment query via raw sql.Selector
patterns.description: GetTaxCodeByAppMapping uses a raw sql.P predicate (app_mappings @> '...') because Ent has no native JSONB containment operator.

patterns.name: Constraint error mapped to GenericConflictError
patterns.description: db.IsConstraintError(err) on create maps to models.NewGenericConflictError; db.IsNotFound maps to domain-specific NewTaxCodeNotFoundError.

patterns.name: Config struct with models.Validator compile-time assertion
patterns.description: Config implements models.Validator via var _ models.Validator = (*Config)(nil); New() calls config.Validate() before constructing the adapter.

key_file_guides.role: Adapter constructor, Config validation, Tx/WithTx/Self triad.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must implement all three transaction rebinding methods or entutils.TransactingRepo will fail to compile.

key_file_guides.role: All five CRUD operations plus GetTaxCodeByAppMapping implementing taxcode.Repository.
key_file_guides.watch_for: GetTaxCodeByAppMapping uses a raw JSONB @> predicate; if the taxcode.TaxCodeAppMapping struct fields change the marshal output must stay compatible with the stored column format.

key_file_guides.role: Single MapTaxCodeFromEntity function translating *db.TaxCode to taxcode.TaxCode domain type.
key_file_guides.watch_for: lo.FromPtr(entity.AppMappings) silently returns a zero-value slice when the column is NULL — ensure new nullable fields get the same nil-safe treatment.

anti_patterns: Calling a.db.TaxCode.* directly in a helper without wrapping in entutils.TransactingRepo — the helper falls off the ctx-bound transaction.
Hard-deleting rows with .Remove() instead of setting deleted_at via SetDeletedAt.
Adding raw SQL outside a sql.P / sql.Selector wrapper — bypasses Ent's query builder and breaks dialect portability.
Returning a non-domain error (e.g. raw ent error) without mapping via db.IsNotFound / db.IsConstraintError.
Skipping input.Validate() to save a round-trip — callers in the service layer also validate, but the adapter is the last defense before the DB.

decisions.decision: entutils.TransactingRepo used on every write, not only explicit tx callers.
decisions.rationale: Ent transactions are carried implicitly in ctx; any helper that holds a raw *entdb.Client falls off the transaction unless it rebinds via TransactingRepo.

decisions.decision: JSONB containment query via raw sql.Selector for GetTaxCodeByAppMapping.
decisions.rationale: Ent has no built-in @> operator for JSONB array containment; the raw predicate is the only way to express 'find rows whose app_mappings array contains this element'.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new mutating Repository method following the existing pattern.

openmeter/taxcode/service.purpose: Business-logic layer for tax codes implementing taxcode.Service; enforces system-managed protection, upsert-on-conflict for app mappings, and wraps all adapter calls in transaction.Run.

patterns.name: transaction.Run wraps every adapter call
patterns.description: Every service method wraps its adapter delegation in transaction.Run (or transaction.RunWithNoValue for void returns) so the operation is atomic even when called outside an existing tx.
patterns.example: return transaction.Run(ctx, s.adapter, func(ctx context.Context) (taxcode.TaxCode, error) { return s.adapter.CreateTaxCode(ctx, input) })

patterns.name: IsManagedBySystem guard before mutations
patterns.description: UpdateTaxCode and DeleteTaxCode fetch the existing record first and return models.NewGenericConflictError(taxcode.ErrTaxCodeManagedBySystem) if IsManagedBySystem() is true and input.AllowAnnotations is false.

patterns.name: GetOrCreate with conflict retry
patterns.description: GetOrCreateByAppMapping handles a create→conflict race by catching models.IsGenericConflictError and retrying with GetTaxCodeByAppMapping.

patterns.name: input.Validate() at service entry
patterns.description: Every exported method validates input before any adapter call, returning early on error.
patterns.example: if err := input.Validate(); err != nil { return taxcode.TaxCode{}, err }

patterns.name: Key derivation convention for auto-created tax codes
patterns.description: GetOrCreateByAppMapping derives the key as '<AppType>_<TaxCode>' when auto-creating a new record from an app mapping.

key_file_guides.role: Sole service implementation; all methods delegate to taxcode.Repository after validation and system-managed checks.
key_file_guides.watch_for: The get-then-mutate pattern inside transaction.Run is not atomic at the DB level without the adapter's underlying transaction — ensure the adapter's TransactingRepo rebinds correctly or concurrent requests can bypass the system-managed guard.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests covering system-managed block/bypass and user-managed CRUD paths using taxcodetestutils.NewTestEnv.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Tests call t.Context() (not context.Background()); follow this for any new tests. The test bootstraps via env.DBSchemaMigrate(t) before first use.

anti_patterns: Calling adapter methods outside transaction.Run — loses atomicity for multi-step operations like get-then-update.
Skipping IsManagedBySystem check in new mutating methods — allows external callers to overwrite system-synced records.
Using context.Background() instead of t.Context() in tests.
Implementing business logic (key derivation, conflict retry) inside the adapter instead of the service layer.
Adding adapter dependencies other than taxcode.Repository — the service must stay decoupled from Ent directly.

decisions.decision: transaction.Run at the service layer in addition to entutils.TransactingRepo in the adapter.
decisions.rationale: Multi-step flows (get + mutate) must be atomic; starting the transaction at the service layer ensures both the guard read and the write share the same transaction.

decisions.decision: AllowAnnotations flag on UpdateTaxCodeInput/DeleteTaxCodeInput to bypass system-managed protection.
decisions.rationale: The LLM cost sync job needs to update system-managed records; a flag is safer than removing the guard entirely or exposing a separate internal method.

openmeter/taxcode/testutils.purpose: Self-contained test environment for taxcode integration tests: wires a real Postgres DB, Ent client, adapter, and service without importing app/common.

patterns.name: NewTestEnv constructs the full stack from primitives
patterns.description: TestEnv builds testutils.TestDB → entdb.Client → taxcodeadapter → taxcodeservice.New without touching app/common Wire providers, avoiding import cycles.
patterns.example: adapter, err := taxcodeadapter.New(taxcodeadapter.Config{Client: client, Logger: logger}); env.Service = taxcodeservice.New(adapter, logger)

patterns.name: sync.Once for safe Close
patterns.description: TestEnv.Close uses sync.Once to prevent double-close when both t.Cleanup and explicit calls race.

patterns.name: DBSchemaMigrate called explicitly in each test
patterns.description: Tests call env.DBSchemaMigrate(t) before first DB access; this runs client.Schema.Create(t.Context()) to ensure the schema is up-to-date for the isolated pgtestdb database.

key_file_guides.role: Sole file; exports NewTestEnv and TestEnv with Logger, Service, Client fields.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Close must close both EntDriver and PGDriver in order; omitting either leaks the pgtestdb template database.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common in testutils — creates import cycles and couples test setup to the full DI graph.
Calling env.Close before DBSchemaMigrate — schema won't exist for the test.
Using context.Background() instead of t.Context() in DBSchemaMigrate or service calls.

decisions.decision: Build adapter and service directly from constructors rather than via Wire.
decisions.rationale: Keeps test helpers independent from app/common so unrelated wiring changes don't create test-only import cycles.
